title: [InstCombine] Extend canonicalization of addition to positive numbers
author: SiliconA-Z
description:
https://alive2.llvm.org/ce/z/6PQdaP

Extend this to positive numbers too.

tests.test_body:
define i8 @sadd_sat_int_min_minus_x_nsw(i8 %x, i8 %y) {
  %sub = sub nsw i8 -128, %x
  %cmp = icmp sgt i8 %sub, %y
  %add = add i8 %x, %y
  %r = select i1 %cmp, i8 -128, i8 %add
  ret i8 %r
}

define i32 @pr153053_strict_pred_with_nonconstant_rhs(i32 %x, i32 %y) {
entry:
  %cmp = icmp slt i32 %x, %y
  %add = add i32 %x, 1
  %res = select i1 %cmp, i32 %add, i32 2147483647
  ret i32 %res
}
